description_long: This is a rectangular, box-shaped stereo speaker system with a matte black finish and subtle wood-textured side panels. The front face features two prominent circular speaker drivers: a larger woofer at the bottom with a light gray cone and a smaller tweeter above it, both surrounded by black mounting rings. The rear side includes a circular bass reflex port near the top and a recessed terminal panel with red and black spring-clip connectors for speaker wire input. The top, bottom, and side panels are plain and unadorned, contributing to a minimalist, utilitarian design. The overall construction suggests a sturdy wooden or MDF enclosure, typical for home or studio audio equipment. No visible branding, control panels, or display screens are present on any surface.
description: A black, boxy stereo speaker with two front-facing drivers, a rear bass port, and wire terminals, finished in matte with wood-textured sides.
description_view_0: The front view shows two circular speaker drivers (woofer and tweeter) set into a black panel, with no visible controls or branding.
description_view_1: The left side view displays a plain, flat black surface with no features or openings.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals a circular bass reflex port and a terminal panel with red and black connectors for speaker wires.
description_view_3: The right side view is identical to the left, showing a featureless, flat black panel.
